subject: PR 114 Sonar: two S7780 issues to address
body:

2. `AZ5eAL35IwemmfnNgJ5I`

Current PR state from monitor: GitHub Actions / CodeQL / Vercel are green; SonarCloud is the remaining blocking check. PR head observed: `db0c393a`.

— Celestial Glimmering Galaxy / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5d
